info.name: Jalan Kebijakan Module
info.description: API collection for Jalan Kebijakan (Road Policy) module - Management of road policy values including PPN, SMKK, and interest rates by region, month, and year

item.name: Query Endpoints

request.description:
Get all jalan kebijakan with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "JalanKebijakan list retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "data": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "idKabkota": 1,
        "bulan": 1,
        "tahun": 2024,
        "nilai_ppn": 11.0,
        "nilai_smkk": 15.5,
        "suku_bunga": 6.5,
        "createdAt": "...",
        "updatedAt": "..."
      }
    ],
    "page": 1,
    "amount": 10,
    "total": 50,
    "totalPages": 5
  }
}
```

Get single jalan kebijakan by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "JalanKebijakan retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "idKabkota": 1,
    "bulan": 1,
    "tahun": 2024,
    "nilai_ppn": 11.0,
    "nilai_smkk": 15.5,
    "suku_bunga": 6.5,
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

item.description: Read endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (ADMIN, SUPERADMIN)

request.description:
Create new jalan kebijakan entry.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Body**:
```json
{
  "idKabkota": number,      // Required - City/Regency ID
  "bulan": number,           // Required - Month (1-12)
  "tahun": number,           // Required - Year (>=2000)
  "nilai_ppn": number,       // Required - PPN (VAT) percentage (0-100)
  "nilai_smkk": number,      // Required - SMKK percentage (0-100)
  "suku_bunga": number       // Required - Interest rate percentage (0-100)
}
```

**Policy Values**:
- **PPN (Pajak Pertambahan Nilai)**: VAT percentage, typically 11% in Indonesia
- **SMKK (Standar Mutu Konstruksi dan Keamanan)**: Construction quality and safety standard percentage, typically 10-20%
- **Suku Bunga**: Interest rate for financing, typically 5-8%

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "JalanKebijakan created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "idKabkota": 1,
    "bulan": 1,
    "tahun": 2024,
    "nilai_ppn": 11.0,
    "nilai_smkk": 15.5,
    "suku_bunga": 6.5,
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Update existing jalan kebijakan.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,              // Required - ID to update
  "idKabkota": number,      // Optional - City/Regency ID
  "bulan": number,          // Optional - Month (1-12)
  "tahun": number,          // Optional - Year (>=2000)
  "nilai_ppn": number,      // Optional - PPN percentage
  "nilai_smkk": number,     // Optional - SMKK percentage
  "suku_bunga": number      // Optional - Interest rate percentage
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "JalanKebijakan updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "idKabkota": 1,
    "bulan": 1,
    "tahun": 2024,
    "nilai_ppn": 11.5,
    "nilai_smkk": 16.0,
    "suku_bunga": 7.0,
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Delete jalan kebijakan by ID.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "JalanKebijakan deleted successfully"
}
```

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Accessible by ADMIN and SUPERADMIN
